Rules.InvariantScript:
If(
    ThisItem.Value = "C",
    Set(
        varScreenNumber,
        "0"
    ),
    ThisItem.Value = "OK",
    Set(
        varOK,
        true
    ),
    varScreenNumber = "0",
    Set(
        varScreenNumber,
        ThisItem.Value
    ),
    Len(varScreenNumber) <= 4,
    Set(
        varScreenNumber,
        varScreenNumber & ThisItem.Value
    )
)
